Lyrics.text:
Mandehana mitoria,
Mand ehana mitoria
Ilay hafatr'i Jesosy,
Ilay hafatr'i Jeso ,

Lyrics.label: Refrain
Lyrics.text:
Mand ehana, mandehana mitoria,
Aza mety reraka
M androsoa, mandrosoa, mandrosoa
Amin'izao fotoana izao
:;: Mandehana , mandehana mitoria
Ilay hafatr'i Jeso;
Mandrosoa, mandrosoa, mandr osoa
Aza mety sasatra :;:

Mandehana mitoria,
Mandehana mitoria
Aza ketraka na kivy
Fa ny Tompo homba anao.

Halaviro ny hakamoana
Halaviro ny hakamoana
Ka sikino hery vao
Ny fonao ha trami zao
